data.title: Galaxy preps $100M hedge fund for crypto and traditional assets, shifting strategy amid market changes.
data.description: Galaxy is set to implement a novel hedge fund approach focusing on a combination of crypto tokens and traditional financial stocks as the enthusiasm for an "only-up" market stage diminishes.

data.title: Samsung Biologics had a successful Q4 in 2025, with revenue hitting KRW 1,286 billion. FY'25 revenue stood at KRW 4,557 billion, showing strong growth potential.
data.description: The revenue for the fourth quarter of 2025 was reported at KRW 1,286 billion, with the total revenue for the fiscal year 2025 reaching KRW 4,557 billion. The company sustained its performance momentum by meeting operational targets and meeting high client demand. It further enhanced its prospects for long-term growth by increasing manufacturing preparedness and operational capacity.

data.title: LatticeFlow AI acquires AI Sonar, leading AI discovery platform, to enable secure AI governance. Acquisition announced at WEF.
data.description: LatticeFlow AI, a Swiss deep-tech company specializing in evidence-based AI governance, has revealed the acquisition of AI Sonar Ltd based in Dublin, Ireland during the World Economic Forum. AI Sonar, a subsidiary of CloudSphere Ltd, boasts a cutting-edge AI discovery platform that aids businesses and independent software vendors (ISVs) in identifying shadow AI. The solution provided by AI Sonar will be maintained under its existing brand by LatticeFlow AI. This acquisition marks a significant move by LatticeFlow AI in expanding its offerings.

data.title: Ramboll, Acutro form alliance to drive smart, sustainable buildings. London-based partnership focuses on innovation.
data.description: A strategic alliance has been formed between Ramboll and Acutro in London to enhance the development of intelligent buildings. This partnership aims to promote smarter and more sustainable buildings. The alliance between the two companies focuses on leveraging their expertise to drive innovation in the field of smart buildings. This collaboration is crucial in advancing technology for intelligent buildings and promoting sustainable practices in the construction industry. The partnership between Ramboll and Acutro signifies a commitment to creating more efficient and environmentally friendly building solutions.

data.title: Quinbrook sells Flexitricity to Drax Group plc subsidiary.
data.description: London-based company, Quinbrook, has recently sold its energy optimization business, Flexitricity, to Drax Smart Generation HoldCo Limited, a subsidiary of Drax Group plc. This sale marks a significant transaction in the energy sector.

data.title: FinovateEurope 2026 to feature demo companies and speakers in financial/banking tech at London event with 1,000+ attendees.
data.description: London-based company Finovate, specializing in financial and banking technology innovation, unveiled the lineup of demo companies and speakers for FinovateEurope 2026. The event is scheduled for February 10-11 at the Intercontinental O2 in London. FinovateEurope aims to influence the digital evolution of the financial services sector and is expected to draw over 1,000 high-ranking participants, with 500 representatives from banks and financial institutions.

data.title: STREAMWIDE partners with UPCAD in the Philippines to deploy critical communications platform for first responders.
data.description: In Manila, Philippines, STREAMWIDE has been chosen by UPCAD to provide the technology for its new critical communications platform for first responders. This platform aims to enhance emergency response services in the country.
